title: Eliza's Grandmother's Pecan Butter Balls
description: Mildred Trauger's tender pecan butter ball cookies — a buttery shortbread dough rolled with finely chopped pecans, baked, and dusted in powdered sugar.
instructions: Sift flour, sugar, and salt; work in the butter and vanilla. Add 2 cups of nuts; mix well.
Shape into 1-inch balls. Bake on a cookie sheet at 325°F for 25 minutes.
